name: Steganography with RAR
notes:
This rule detects a privilege escalation attempt via a rogue Windows directory environment variable

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Greedy Compression Using Rar.EXE
SIGMA Description: Detects RAR usage that creates an archive from a suspicious folder, either a system folder or one of the folders often used by attackers for staging purposes


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Process File File Path") MATCHES '.*?(rar\.exe).*?' OR ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(\.exe a).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( a -m).*' ) ) AND ( ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( -hp).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( -r).*?' ) AND ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\\\\\*\.).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\\\\\\\\\*\.).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\users\\public\\).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( \%public\%).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\windows\\).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\PerfLogs\\).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\temp).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\\$recycle\.bin\\).*?' ) ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Steganography with RAR on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (    LOWER("Process File File Path") MATCHES '.*?(rar\.exe).*?'    OR       (            LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(\.exe a).*'          OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( a -m).*'      ) ) AND (    ( 	 LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( -hp).*?'    OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( -r).*?'   )  AND    (      LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\\\\\*\.).*?'   OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\\\\\\\\\*\.).*?'   OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\users\\public\\).*?'   OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( \%public\%).*?'   OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\windows\\).*?'   OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\PerfLogs\\).*?'   OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\temp).*?'   OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?( c:\\\$recycle\.bin\\).*?'   ) ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Privilege Escalation via Windir Environment Variable
Event description: Detects a privilege escalation attempt via a rogue Windows directory environment variable
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
